industries.title: Oil & Gas
industries.description: Engineered sealing solutions for lethal, high-pressure, high-temperature applications handling toxic hydrocarbons across midstream and downstream operations
industries.fullDescription: The oil and gas industry demands sealing solutions that can withstand extreme pressures, temperatures, and corrosive environments. Inmarco provides comprehensive sealing products for midstream transportation and storage, and downstream refining operations.
challenges: Extreme Operating Conditions
Aggressive Chemical Environment
Fugitive Emissions Control
Safety-Critical Operations
Unit-Specific Challenges
Reliability & Maintenance
Regulatory Compliance
solutions: High-temperature graphite packing for critical process valves
PTFE low-emission packing sets for aggressive chemical service
Specially formulated compression packing for highly congealing media
High-performance metal gaskets for critical flange connections
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements

industries.title: Power Generation
industries.description: Low-downtime sealing solutions for steam turbines, boiler feed systems, and critical power generation equipment operating under extreme thermal cycling
industries.fullDescription: Power generation facilities require sealing solutions that deliver uninterrupted performance under extreme thermal and mechanical stress. From coal-fired plants to combined-cycle gas turbines and nuclear facilities, Inmarco offers proven sealing technologies for critical rotating and static equipment.
challenges: Extreme thermal cycling (ambient to 600°C) during startups and shutdowns
High-speed rotating equipment (3600 RPM turbines)
Extreme pressure surges and steam hammer effects
Superheated steam and corrosive condensate chemistry
Extended run cycles requiring 3-5 year seal life
Fugitive emissions compliance for SOx, NOx, and particulates
Erosion from fly ash and combustion byproducts
Water chemistry variations in cooling and condensate systems
solutions: Oxidation-inhibited graphite packing for high-temperature steam valves
Graphite pressure seal valve packing with metallic end caps for anti-extrusion
High-pressure, high-temperature metallic gaskets for turbine flanges
Advanced sealing systems for boiler feed pumps
Specially engineered packing sets for soot blower applications
High-performance Metal gasketing solution for flange joint
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements
applications: High-pressure steam turbine isolation, control, and interceptor valves
Supercritical and ultra-supercritical boiler feed pumps
Heat recovery steam generator (HRSG) valves and expansion joints
Main steam isolation valves (MSIV) for nuclear applications
Boiler circulation pumps and economizer systems
Selective catalytic reduction (SCR) ammonia injection valves
Carbon capture and storage (CCS) compression systems
Deaerator storage tank level control valves
Steam attemperation and pressure reducing stations

industries.title: Chemical
industries.description: Chemical-inert sealing solutions engineered for extreme pH environments, handling concentrated sulfuric acid, caustic soda, chlorine, and volatile organic compounds with zero compatibility failure
industries.fullDescription: Chemical processing facilities require sealing materials with exceptional chemical resistance and reliability. Inmarco delivers comprehensive sealing solutions for handling acids, bases, solvents, and aggressive chemicals across batch and continuous process operations.
challenges: Wide range of chemical compatibility requirements
Varying pH levels from highly acidic to caustic
Temperature and pressure variations
Fugitive emission regulations compliance
Product purity requirements
solutions: Chemically resistant PTFE/ePTFE flange joint gaskets
Low-emission valve packing for toxic and volatile chemicals
Specially engineered metallic gaskets for aggressive chemicals like hydrofluoric acid
Specially engineered gasketing solution with low seating stress requirement for flange joint integrity - CNAF, Elastomeric
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements
applications: Sulfuric acid concentration and oleum production units
Nitric acid and mixed acid reactor systems
Ethylene oxide and propylene oxide reactors
Caustic soda and sodium hypochlorite transfer systems
Corrosive media metering and dosing pumps

industries.title: Water & Wastewater Treatment
industries.description: Reliable sealing solutions for water treatment and wastewater management systems
industries.fullDescription: Water and wastewater treatment facilities require sealing solutions that resist chemical exposure, maintain hygiene standards, and deliver long-term reliability. Inmarco provides comprehensive sealing products for pumps, valves, filtration systems, and treatment equipment.
challenges: Chemical resistance to treatment agents
Exposure to aggressive wastewater
Strict environmental compliance requirements
Continuous operation demands
Varying pH levels and temperatures
solutions: Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements

industries.title: Marine
industries.description: High-performance sealing solutions for stern tubes, rudder posts, and critical seawater applications in marine vessels
industries.fullDescription: Marine environments present unique sealing challenges with constant exposure to saltwater, humidity, and demanding operational conditions. Inmarco provides corrosion-resistant sealing solutions for naval vessels, commercial ships, offshore platforms, and marine infrastructure.
challenges: Saltwater corrosion
Humidity and moisture exposure
Vibration and shock loads
Limited maintenance access
Extended service life requirements
Strict regulatory compliance
solutions: Specially engineered corrosion-resistant, abrasion-resistant, and mechanically resilient packing systems
High-performance tank lid packing for marine applications
Fire-safe marine gaskets for critical applications
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements
applications: Main propulsion engine stern tube and shaft sealing systems
Rudder stock and rudder carrier sealing
Cargo pump and ballast pump sealing (tankers and bulk carriers)
Marine diesel engine fuel injection and cooling systems
Low-sulfur fuel oil (LSFO) and marine gas oil (MGO) transfer pumps
Seawater cooling pumps and heat exchanger sealing
Naval vessel propulsion and auxiliary systems
Submarine seawater service pumps and hull penetrations
LNG carrier cryogenic pump sealing systems
Chemical tanker cargo handling and tank cleaning equipment
Dredger cutter head and suction pump systems

industries.title: Cement
industries.description: Heavy-duty, abrasion-resistant sealing solutions engineered for extreme kiln temperatures and harsh cement manufacturing environments
industries.fullDescription: Cement manufacturing involves extreme temperatures, abrasive materials, and dusty environments that challenge sealing performance. Inmarco offers robust sealing solutions designed for kiln operations, grinding mills, conveyor systems, and processing equipment in cement plants.
challenges: High kiln temperatures
Abrasive cement dust and particles
Continuous heavy-duty operation
Harsh alkaline environment
Equipment vibration and movement
solutions: High-temperature carbon graphite seals for kiln operations
Wear-resistant composite packing for abrasive environments
Dust-proof compression gaskets for cement applications
Heavy-duty fluid sealing solutions for continuous operation
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements
applications: Cement kiln rotary seals and expansion joints
Clinker cooler grate sealing and air locks
Raw mill and cement mill grinding equipment
Slurry pumps for raw material processing
High-temperature process pumps (kiln feed, coal injection)
Water cooling system pumps and heat exchangers
Valves handling cement kiln dust and hot gases
Fuel handling valves (coal, petcoke, alternative fuels)
Dust collection and baghouse filter system valves
Cement silo discharge and transfer pumps
Quarry dewatering and process water pumps

industries.title: Fertilizers
industries.description: Specialized sealing solutions for high-pressure ammonia synthesis reactors, corrosive acid handling, and aggressive urea production environments
industries.fullDescription: Fertilizer production involves handling ammonia synthesis, urea synthesis, nitric acid, phosphoric acid, sulfuric acid and NPK fertilizer production facilities.
challenges: Extreme pressure, temperature, and thermal cycling conditions
Highly corrosive acids and aggressive chemical media
Abrasive slurries causing severe wear and erosion
Crystallization, fouling, and material embrittlement
Toxic and hazardous substance containment
Oxidizing atmospheres and gas permeation challenges
solutions: Ammonia-resistant hybrid packing for synthesis loops
Advanced hybrid packing systems for carbamate pump applications
Low-emission valve stem packing with fugitive emission control
Fluoropolymer-based packing engineered to resist crystallization and embrittlement
Corrosion-resistant compression packing for concentrated acid service
High-pressure reactor gaskets rated for extreme conditions
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements
applications: Acid production and storage systems (nitric, sulfuric, phosphoric)
Phosphoric acid reactors and filtration systems
Compressors and process gas handling systems

industries.title: Metallurgy
industries.description: Durable sealing and thermal insulation solutions for blast furnaces, molten metal handling, and extreme high-temperature steel production environments
industries.fullDescription: Metallurgical operations expose sealing materials to some of the harshest conditions in industrial processing. Inmarco specializes in sealing solutions engineered to withstand molten metals, extreme temperatures, abrasive materials, and corrosive atmospheres in steel mills, foundries, and metal processing facilities.
challenges: Temperatures exceeding 1000°C in furnaces and casting
Molten metal and corrosive slag handling
Severe abrasive wear from ore and scale particles
Extreme thermal shock and cycling stress
Corrosive gas exposure (SO₂, CO, HF, H₂S)
Oxidizing atmospheres and chemical attack
solutions: Reinforced graphite packing for extreme temperature applications
Specially engineered hybrid packing for chemical and corrosive media
Custom-engineered seals for molten metal ladles and pots
Metal gaskets for extreme temperature and pressure conditions
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements
applications: Blast furnace systems and blast valves
Coke oven batteries and gas recovery units

industries.title: Pulp & Paper
industries.description: High-performance sealing solutions for abrasive chemical slurries, corrosive bleach applications, and harsh pulp production environments
industries.fullDescription: Pulp and paper mills require sealing solutions that resist aggressive chemicals, handle high temperatures, and perform reliably in wet, humid conditions. Inmarco delivers sealing products for digesters, bleaching systems, papermaking machines, and auxiliary equipment.
challenges: Aggressive chemical exposure (chlorine dioxide, caustic soda, sulfuric acid)
Hot, humid, and corrosive operating environments
High-speed continuous operation with minimal downtime tolerance
Abrasive fiber slurries and pulp stock causing accelerated wear
Extreme temperature variations (ambient to 200°C in digesters)
Black liquor handling with high solids content and alkalinity
Steam condensate corrosion and thermal cycling stress
solutions: Specially engineered chemical and abrasion-resistant packing systems
High-performance packing for continuous digester applications
Graphite-based packing for high-temperature steam valve service
Custom-engineered abrasion-resistant packing for soft sleeve pumps
Specially formulated packing for black liquor pump applications
Corrosion-resistant metallic gaskets for aggressive chemical service
PTFE-based packing for bleach plant and chemical handling
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements
applications: Black liquor pumps and circulation systems
White liquor and green liquor pumps
Caustic soda and chlorine dioxide handling systems
Bleach plant pumps (chlorine, peroxide, oxygen stages)
Stock preparation pumps and consistency control valves
Refiner dilution and approach flow systems
Recovery boiler feed pumps and steam systems
Tall oil and turpentine recovery equipment
Paper machine headbox and approach flow systems
Press section hydraulic systems and vacuum pumps
Dryer section steam and condensate systems
Size press and coating application systems
Broke handling and white water recovery pumps

industries.title: Food & Pharmaceutical
industries.description: FDA-compliant, sealing solutions ensuring zero product contamination - for sterile pharmaceutical and food-grade processing applications
industries.fullDescription: Food processing and pharmaceutical manufacturing demand the highest standards of hygiene, product purity, and regulatory compliance. Inmarco delivers FDA and EU compliant sealing solutions for processing, mixing, filling, and packaging equipment in both industries.
challenges: Zero-tolerance product contamination and cross-contamination prevention
Clean-in-place (CIP) and steam-in-place (SIP) compatibility
Aseptic and sterile processing requirements for injectable pharmaceuticals
Frequent thermal cycling and sanitization stress (caustic and acid cleaning)
Chemical compatibility with cleaning agents (NaOH, HNO₃, H₂O₂)
Stringent regulatory compliance
solutions: Thermal cycling-resistant packing engineered for repeated CIP/SIP operations
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements

industries.title: Sugar
industries.description: High-performance, abrasion-resistant, non-contaminating food-grade sealing solutions for demanding sugar crushing, extraction, and refining operations
industries.fullDescription: Sugar processing and refining require food-safe sealing materials that maintain product purity while handling high temperatures, steam, and sugar solutions. Inmarco provides FDA-compliant sealing solutions for crushing, extraction, clarification, evaporation, and crystallization processes.
challenges: Food-grade material compliance and zero contamination requirements
Sugar syrup crystallization and hardening in seal chambers
Viscous, sticky residue causing seal congealing and reduced performance
Frequent high-pressure washdown and sanitization cycles
Abrasive bagasse fibers in juice extraction processes
Corrosive acid and lime treatment chemicals in clarification
Thermal cycling stress between processing and cleaning operations
High-temperature steam operations (up to 140°C in evaporators)
solutions: Specially engineered polymide based packing for viscous, abrasive, sticky and congealing media
Hybrid packing for abrasive and corrosive media
Self lubricated packing for steam service
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements

industries.title: OEM
industries.description: Next-generation fugitive emission packing and gasketing solutions, custom-engineered for original equipment manufacturers, exceeding international regulatory requirements
industries.fullDescription: Original Equipment Manufacturers require reliable sealing partners who understand design integration, performance specifications, and supply chain demands. Inmarco collaborates with OEMs to develop custom sealing solutions that enhance equipment performance and reliability.
challenges: Evolving industry standards requiring continuous compliance updates
Extensive resources required for supplier qualification, product testing, and documentation
Tight project timelines for bidding and execution
Complex application-specific design and performance requirements
Demand for manufacturing consistency, repeatability, and long-term reliability
Supply chain credibility, scalability, and on-time delivery assurance
Comprehensive technical support and detailed engineering documentation needs
solutions: Graphite and PTFE based low-emission packing for control valves
Custom-engineered sealing solutions for specialized specific application requirements

oem_control_valves: Ball control valves (V-port, segmented ball, characterized ball)
Rotary control valves (eccentric plug, ball segment)
Severe service control valves (anti-cavitation, noise reduction)
oem_isolation_valves: Gate valves (wedge, parallel slide, knife gate)
Ball valves (floating ball, trunnion-mounted, split-body, reduced-bore)
Safety relief valves and pressure relief valves
oem_reciprocating_pumps: Metering and dosing pumps (precision chemical injection)
